allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'bookings: {len\(d\)}건'\); [print\(f'  {b[\\"customerName\\"]} | {b[\\"status\\"]} | {b[\\"car\\"][\\"name\\"]}'\) for b in d[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'cars: {len\(d\)}대'\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"brand\\"]} {c[\\"name\\"]} | {c[\\"category\\"]} | {c[\\"company\\"][\\"name\\"]}'\) for c in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'locations: {len\(d\)}개'\); [print\(f'  {l[\\"name\\"]} | {l[\\"company\\"][\\"name\\"]}'\) for l in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f'{c[\\"slug\\"]}: {c[\\"id\\"]}'\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'slug 필터 테스트: {d[0][\\"name\\"]} / id={d[0][\\"id\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; cars=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in cars[0].items\(\) if k in ['name','weekendPrice','holidayPrice','imageUrl','pricingRules']}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d['name'], '| images:', d['images']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id:', d.get\('id'\), '| status:', d.get\('status'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; cars=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['name'], '| images:', c['images']\) for c in cars[:3]]")
